carryover-analysis

Erica Griffin

2026-02-16

model1 <- lmer(Mean_TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + (1 | Nest), data = carryover_df)
summary(model1)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: Mean_TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + (1 | Nest)
##    Data: carryover_df
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 313.6
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.0881 -0.5143 -0.1462  0.6018  2.5021 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Nest     (Intercept) 0.7143   0.8451  
##  Residual             0.4738   0.6883  
## Number of obs: 124, groups:  Nest, 27
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                Estimate Std. Error        df t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)                    9.308094   0.251400 22.357301  37.025   <2e-16
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort  0.004093   0.351517 22.841210   0.012    0.991
##                                  
## (Intercept)                   ***
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr)
## Indvdl_TP_C -0.715
res <- simulateResiduals(model1)
plot(res)

ggplot(carryover_df, aes(x = Individual_Treatment, y = Mean_TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, color = "pink") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "pink") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Mean TRF"  )

model2 <- lmer(Mean_TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + Mass + (1 | Nest), data = carryover_df)
summary(model2)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: Mean_TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + Mass + (1 | Nest)
##    Data: carryover_df
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 317.3
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.0539 -0.5432 -0.1308  0.6093  2.4953 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Nest     (Intercept) 0.6838   0.8269  
##  Residual             0.4807   0.6933  
## Number of obs: 124, groups:  Nest, 27
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                Estimate Std. Error        df t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)                     8.56711    1.08175 120.20138   7.920 1.34e-12
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort   0.03547    0.34864  22.57061   0.102    0.920
## Mass                            0.03481    0.04946 120.83137   0.704    0.483
##                                  
## (Intercept)                   ***
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort    
## Mass                             
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) I_TP_C
## Indvdl_TP_C -0.295       
## Mass        -0.974  0.137
res <- simulateResiduals(model2)
plot(res)

model3 <- lmer(Mean_TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + Mass + Individual_Treatment*Mass + (1 | Nest), data = carryover_df)
summary(model3)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: Mean_TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + Mass + Individual_Treatment *  
##     Mass + (1 | Nest)
##    Data: carryover_df
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 318.5
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.0027 -0.5582 -0.0740  0.5643  2.4611 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Nest     (Intercept) 0.6243   0.7901  
##  Residual             0.4875   0.6982  
## Number of obs: 124, groups:  Nest, 27
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                     Estimate Std. Error        df t value
## (Intercept)                          6.93342    1.65434 116.74668   4.191
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort        2.66100    2.12246 118.87611   1.254
## Mass                                 0.11155    0.07689 118.34062   1.451
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort:Mass  -0.12571    0.10029 119.84961  -1.253
##                                    Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                        5.42e-05 ***
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort         0.212    
## Mass                                  0.149    
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort:Mass    0.212    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) In_TP_C Mass  
## Indvdl_TP_C -0.779               
## Mass        -0.990  0.771        
## Indv_TP_C:M  0.759 -0.987  -0.767
res <- simulateResiduals(model3)
plot(res)

now for some temp

ggplot(carryover_df, aes(x = incubation_max_temp, y = Mean_TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Max Temp",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

ggplot(carryover_df, aes(x = incubation_below_18.5, y = Mean_TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Days Below 18.5",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

ggplot(carryover_df, aes(x = incubation_avg_temp, y = Mean_TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Average Temp",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

model3 <- lmer(Mean_TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + incubation_max_temp + Individual_Treatment*incubation_max_temp + (1 | Nest), data = carryover_df)
summary(model3)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## Mean_TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + incubation_max_temp + Individual_Treatment *  
##     incubation_max_temp + (1 | Nest)
##    Data: carryover_df
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 312.6
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.1180 -0.5159 -0.1247  0.6338  2.4975 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Nest     (Intercept) 0.8041   0.8967  
##  Residual             0.4698   0.6854  
## Number of obs: 124, groups:  Nest, 27
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                   Estimate Std. Error      df
## (Intercept)                                        12.6183    12.5972 21.5501
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort                      -8.4213    15.3775 22.0523
## incubation_max_temp                                -0.1508     0.5735 21.5957
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort:incubation_max_temp   0.3845     0.7007 22.1032
##                                                   t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)                                         1.002    0.328
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort                      -0.548    0.589
## incubation_max_temp                                -0.263    0.795
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort:incubation_max_temp   0.549    0.589
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) In_TP_C incb__
## Indvdl_TP_C -0.819               
## incbtn_mx_t -1.000  0.819        
## Ind_TP_C:__  0.818 -1.000  -0.819
res <- simulateResiduals(model3)
plot(res)
